description: Canonical Secret Class roster, kept separate from data/design/hero-codex-v1.json because that file is locked to exactly 21 Class 1/Class 2 heroes across seven class lines (see tools/validate-hero-codex.mjs). Secret classes are Class Tier 3, unlocked through map progression, and never part of the normal Class 1 -> Class 2 evolution or the standard Shop pool.
reservedFutureNote: Map 2 (lava_hell -> black_dragon_knight) and Map 3 (heaven_temple -> sword_saint) secret classes are named here for forward compatibility only. No canonical data for them exists yet and none is fabricated in this file.

fusion.note: Ninja stacks and star-combines through the existing same-hero 3-copy merge only; it is never an output of the Class 1 -> Class 2 fusion rules in hero-fusion-v1.json.

combatData.note: Combat design v1. Female high-attack-speed melee physical assassin: DPS comes from frequent basic attacks (pAtk 40 x atkSpeed 1.7 ~= 68 basic DPS, below Duelist ~96 and Ranger ~79), not single big hits. Low HP (360, clearly under frontline melee) and low pDef/mDef with modest per-hit pAtk are the intended weaknesses — fragile and disproportionately punished by high-armor enemies. atkSpeed 1.7 is the roster's highest (just above Ranger 1.65) without breaking combat timing. Skill is a modest single-target physical finisher on the lowest-HP enemy (backline pressure), not a burst nuke.
